[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000110000 2
1 000100000 1
2 000000000 a
3 000111111 6
4 101000101 4
5 000011001 3
6 110101000 4
7 111101000 5
